mapper.sql: id, scanid, weight, bodyFat, percentBodyFat, bmi, kcal, waistToHip, fluid, muscle, gymEngineId createTime
mapper.insert: insert into bodys_info (id, scanid, weight, bodyFat, percentBodyFat, bmi, kcal, waistToHip, fluid, muscle, createTime) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scanid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{weight,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{bodyFat,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{percentBodyFat,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{bmi,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{kcal,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{waistToHip,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{fluid,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{muscle,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into bodys_info
id,
userId,
vid,
scanid,
weight,
bodyFat,
percentBodyFat,
bmi,
kcal,
waistToHip,
fluid,
muscle,
result,
gymEngineId,
createTime,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{vid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{scanid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bodyFat,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{percentBodyFat,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bmi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{kcal,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{waistToHip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fluid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{muscle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{gymEngineId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update bodys_info
scanid = #{scanid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bodyFat = #{bodyFat,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
percentBodyFat = #{percentBodyFat,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bmi = #{bmi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
kcal = #{kcal,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
waistToHip = #{waistToHip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fluid = #{fluid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
muscle = #{muscle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
result = #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update bodys_info set scanid = #{scanid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bodyFat = #{bodyFat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, percentBodyFat = #{percentBodyFat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bmi = #{bmi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, kcal = #{kcal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, waistToHip = #{waistToHip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fluid = #{fluid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, muscle = #{muscle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bodys_info WHERE userId=#{userId} AND date_format(createTime, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{createTime}
SELECT * from bodys_info where userId = #{userId} ORDER BY createTime DESC LIMIT 0 ,1
SELECT * FROM body_dimension WHERE userId=#{userId} AND date_format(createTime, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{createTime}
SELECT * FROM body_status WHERE userId=#{userId} AND date_format(createTime, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{createTime}
